  • Industrial and Systems Engineering Directory

Industrial and Systems Engineering Directory

About our faculty and staff

Our nationally recognized faculty, researchers and professional staff are dedicated to excellence in research, education, innovation and service. Learn more about the individuals who make up the Department of Industrial and Systems Engineering by visiting their profiles.

Alexander Abuabara

  • Instructional Assistant Professor, Industrial & Systems Engineering
  • Office: ETB 4013
  • Phone: 979-458-5670
  • Email: abuabara@tamu.edu

Hrayer Aprahamian

  • Assistant Professor, Industrial & Systems Engineering
  • Office: ETB 4020
  • Phone: 979-458-2379
  • Email: hrayer@tamu.edu

Amarnath Banerjee

  • Associate Department Head for Undergraduate Affairs, Industrial & Systems Engineering
  • Professor, Industrial & Systems Engineering
  • Office: ETB 4041
  • Phone: 979-458-2341
  • Email: Banerjee@tamu.edu

Mark Benden

  • Affiliated Faculty, Industrial & Systems Engineering and Multidisciplinary Engineering
  • Director of the Ergonomics Center, Texas A&M University
  • Department Head, Environmental and Occupational Health, Texas A&M School of Public Health
  • Office: 212 Adriance Lab Rd.
  • Phone: 979-436-9334
  • Email: mthowdy@tamu.edu

G. Kemble Bennett

  • Senior Professor, Industrial & Systems Engineering
  • Vice Chancellor and Dean, Emeritus
  • Office: ETB 4007
  • Phone: 979-458-2364
  • Email: kem-bennett@tamu.edu

  • Department Head, Industrial & Systems Engineering
  • Professor, Industrial & Systems Engineering
  • Sugar and Mike Barnes Department Head Chair, Industrial & Systems Engineering
  • Regents Professor
  • Rockwell International Professor
  • Director, TEES Institute for Manufacturing Systems
  • Affiliated Faculty, Multidisciplinary Engineering and Biomedical Engineering
  • Office: ETB 4046
  • Phone: 979-458-2348
  • Email: satish@tamu.edu

  • Professor, Industrial & Systems Engineering
  • Liollio Family Faculty Fellow, Industrial & Systems Engineering
  • Office: ETB 4037
  • Phone: 979-458-2333
  • Email: butenko@tamu.edu

  • Director, Texas A&M Space Institute
  • Affiliated Faculty, Multidisciplinary Engineering and Engineering Academic and Student Affairs
  • Office: ETB 4080 (ISEN), HRBB 722C (AERO)
  • Phone: 979-458-2342 (ISEN), 979-845-3839 (AERO)
  • Email: currie-gregg@tamu.edu
